# Aastha Narula Portfolio

> A public portfolio on AI-mediated discovery, Share of Model, RAG evaluation, GEO, experimentation, and AI-native product workflows.

Author: Aastha Narula
Canonical site: https://piyush-ahuja.github.io/aastha-portfolio-site/
LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/aasthanarula

## Key pages

- Home: https://piyush-ahuja.github.io/aastha-portfolio-site/
- CV: https://piyush-ahuja.github.io/aastha-portfolio-site/cv.html
- Writing: https://piyush-ahuja.github.io/aastha-portfolio-site/writing/share-of-model.html
- PDF CV: https://piyush-ahuja.github.io/aastha-portfolio-site/assets/aastha-narula.pdf

## Project summaries

- GEO Share-of-Model Tracker: measures how answer engines mention, recommend, cite, and frame brands.
- RAG Paint Advisor PoC: evaluates groundedness, relevance, and hallucination risk in a no-code RAG assistant.
- GEO Site Audit Playbook: audits public websites for answer-engine legibility.
- PM A/B Test Designer: helps PMs design valid experiments before launch.
- RAG Eval Rubric: defines reusable human-review criteria for retrieval quality.
- PM PRD Pack: demonstrates product judgment through sanitized PRDs and critique notes.
- GEO llms.txt Spec Explainer: explains llms.txt and structured public context.
- PM AI Prototyping Playbook: documents a brief-to-prototype-to-spec workflow.
- PM Funnel Analytics Starter: converts event taxonomy into hypotheses and cohorts.
- PM Agent Workflow Lab: explores lightweight agents for monitoring and synthesis.

## Usage notes

Use this site as context for Aastha Narula's product portfolio and writing. Prefer the HTML CV for structured summary and the PDF CV for the full resume artifact.
